game_info.title: Frog Fixer - Kero Blaster Tribute
game_info.concept:
C&F Inc. teleporters are going offline all over the place, and it's up to an intrepid frog employee to fix the situation. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/292500/Kero_Blaster/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ C&F Inc. teleporters are going offline all over the place, and it's up to an intrepid frog employee to fix the situation.

Studio Pixel is proud to present Kero Blaster - the latest title from the creator of Cave Story.
The C&F Inc. teleporters are going offline all over the place, and it's up to an intrepid frog employee to fix the situation.
A classic-style, 2D side-scrolling action game packed with adventure.

You are a bipedal frog and master of the Custodial Sciences, charged with the unenviable task of ridding your company's teleporters of the strange black creatures plaguing them.
Pick up all kinds of exciting new tools of the trade while fighting for your life through a menagerie of unique monsters.

2017/3/21
Multilanguage support!

There are also two more games on Steam featuring the cast of Kero Blaster, available for free!
PINK HOUR and its sequel, PINK HEAVEN.

Use them to test out your system for Kero Blaster, or simply enjoy a couple of free games!
game_info.description:
You are Frog Fixer, a specialized technician for C&F Inc. Your mission is to repair the malfunctioning Teleporter 42 in the Industrial Sector. The area is infested with corrupted black sludge creatures. 

Navigate the hazardous facility, blast the corruption with your trusty cleaner-gun, and reach the terminal at the end of the sector to restore operations. Don't fall into the acid pits!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left: Move Left
- Arrow Right: Move Right
- Arrow Up: Aim Up
- Space: Jump (Hold for higher jump)
- Z: Shoot (Fires in facing direction or Up if holding Up)
- Shift: Hold to Lock Position (Strafe/Aim without moving)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause/Unpause
- R: Restart Game (when Game Over)

TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will simulate holding the RIGHT arrow key to move the player and pressing SPACE intermittently to jump. This verifies that physics, gravity, and horizontal movement are functional.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character should move to the right, jump, and land on platforms without falling through the floor or getting stuck in walls.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will use a heuristic to detect nearby enemies and shoot (Z key). It will also attempt to jump over gaps by detecting "pits" in the level data ahead of the player.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully destroy at least one enemy and cross gaps, eventually progressing significantly through the level or winning.
